rationale: Both candidates converge on the same plausible root cause (PR #4834's wake_up() guard vs. a stale test still using level=2), which partially aligns with yenuo26's thread comment pinpointing #4834 as the trigger, but the actual thread shows maintainers still investigating (Flink-ddd asking to trigger a full CI test run) rather than confirming a trivial already-fixed test bug — both candidates overstate certainty and prematurely recommend closing. X delivers a polished, complete, directly postable maintainer answer with actionable guidance. Y is a raw internal run-report dump with duplicated fields and a literally truncated answer_draft cutting off mid-sentence, making it unusable as a maintainer-style reply despite similar underlying diagnosis and slightly more transparent tool-use logging.
